detaileddescription.para: Delegate that denotes when a user report has completed.

parameterdescription.para: true if the report was sent successfully, false otherwise.

detaileddescription.para: Delegate that denotes when create user profile has completed.

parameterdescription.para: the controller number of the associated user that made the request
true if user profile created and/or acquired successfully, false otherwise.

memberdef.argsstring: (FOnQueryUserProfileComplete, int32, bool, const TArray< FUniqueNetIdRef > &, const FOnlineError &)
memberdef.name: DECLARE_MULTICAST_DELEGATE_FourParams

detaileddescription.para: Delegate used when the userProfile query request has completed

parameterdescription.para: the controller number of the associated user that made the request
true if the async action completed without error, false if there was an error
list of user ids that were queried

memberdef.argsstring: (FOnListUserByUserIdComplete, int32, bool, const FListUserDataResponse &, const FOnlineError &)
memberdef.name: DECLARE_MULTICAST_DELEGATE_FourParams
